  method={"patch"}

>

Change email

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"properties":{"new_email":{"format":"email","type":"string"}},"required":["new_email"],"type":"object"}}},"required":true}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"201":{"description":"Email updated."},"400":{"description":"Invalid email or same as current."},"409":{"description":"Email already taken by another user."},"500":{"description":"Internal server error."}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
